name: blood-and-oil
description: Bradley Hope and Justin Scheck's Blood and Oil — extract strategic and geopolitical lessons from Mohammed bin Salman's rise: how oil wealth enables authoritarian power, how reform coexists with repression, and how to analyze political risk in petrostates
useCase: Helps analysts, investors, diplomats, and business leaders understand Saudi geopolitics, evaluate political risk, and navigate engagement with resource-rich autocracies using the MBS Playbook framework.
knownRisks: The book covers events through 2020 — the region continues to evolve rapidly
Geopolitical analysis requires updating with current events beyond this book's scope
